# Unit system

Check your unit details and usage history. Please note that Units is the currency used for YouCam API operations; different AI features deduct different amounts of units. In this document, the code name used for a Unit is "Credit."

## Reference

- **API version:** Not specified
- **OpenAPI version:** 3.0.0
- **Source:** [OpenAPI description](https://docs.perfectcorp.com/_bundle/reference/unit_system.yaml)
- **Servers:** `https://yce-api-01.makeupar.com`

## Authentication

| Name | Type | Scheme / Location | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| BearerAuthentication | http | bearer | Use the `access_token` obtained from authentication and pass it in header: `Authorization:Bearer <access_token>` |
| BearerAuthenticationV2 | http | bearer | Use the standard 'Bearer authentication'. Put your 'API Key' in header: `Authorization:Bearer YOUR_API_KEY`. Notice that there is ' ' a space between 'Bearer' and the 'YOUR_API_KEY'. |

## Endpoints

### `GET` `/s2s/v1.0/client/credit`
**Get unit info**

Display the available API units to two decimal places

**Tags:** API Reference

**Authentication:** BearerAuthentication
#### Responses

**200** — Successful retrieval of unit info

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `results` | `array<object>` | No | — |
| `results.id` | `integer` | No | Unique identifier of this unit |
| `results.type` | `string — ApiSubsToken \| ApiPaygToken` | No | Type of this unit |
| `results.amount` | `integer` | No | This paramenter is deprecated. Use amount_dec instead. Current unit balance. |
| `results.amount_dec` | `number` | No | Remaining units displayed to two decimal places. |
| `results.expiry` | `integer` | No | Unix timestamp of the expiry of this unit (ms) |

**401** — Authentication failed or user does not have necessary permissions

### `GET` `/s2s/v1.0/client/credit/history`
**View unit history**

**Tags:** API Reference

**Authentication:** BearerAuthentication
#### Parameters

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `page_size` | query | `integer` | No | Number of results to return in a page. Valid value should be between 1 and 30. Default 20. |
| `starting_token` | query | `string` | No | Token for current page. Start with `null` for the first page, and use `next_token` from the previous response to start next page |

#### Responses

**200** — Successful retrieval of the unit usage history

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `result` | `object` | No | — |
| `result.next_token` | `string` | No | Token to query next page. |
| `result.history` | `array<object>` | No | — |
| `result.history.id` | `integer` | No | Unique identifier of the history |
| `result.history.timestamp` | `integer` | No | Unix timestamp of the history (ms) |
| `result.history.action` | `string — photo_enhance \| api_photo_enhance \| object_removal \| api_object_removal \| background_removal \| api_background_removal \| colorize \| api_colorize \| text_to_image \| api_text_to_image \| hair_style \| api_hair_style \| blur_background \| change_background \| wig \| trial_gift_text_to_image \| sign_up_gift \| subscription_credits \| subscriber_gift \| permanent_credits \| compensation_from_customer_service \| renew \| expire` | No | Action of this history |
| `result.history.target_id` | `string` | No | Id of the target for this unit. For example, when running AI Photo Enhance task, `target_id` for this history will be `task_id` of the AI Photo Enhance task. When purchasing unit, the `target_id` for this history will be `order_id` |
| `result.history.info` | `object` | No | — |

**400** — Invalid request parameters

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | — |
| `error_code` | `string` | No | — |

**401** — Invalid access token

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error_code` | `string — InvalidAccessToken` | No | Error code:   * InvalidAccessToken - Access token is not given or not valid |

### `GET` `/s2s/v2.0/credit/feature-cost`
**Get feature cost**

Check the unit consumption for each API. The values are consistent with those listed at https://yce.perfectcorp.com/ai-api/api-pricing.

**Tags:** API Reference

**Authentication:** BearerAuthenticationV2
#### Parameters

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `page_size` | query | `integer` | No | Number of results to return in a page. Default 20. value range: [1 - 20] |
| `starting_token` | query | `string` | No | Token for current page. Start with `null` for the first page, and use `next_token` from the previous response to start next page |

#### Responses

**200** — Successful retrieval of the feature cost by sku

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `result` | `object` | No | — |
| `result.next_token` | `string` | No | Token to query next page. `null` when there are no more pages. |
| `result.skus` | `array<object>` | No | List of the skus |
| `result.skus.description` | `string` | No | Description of the sku |
| `result.skus.amount` | `number` | No | Units consumed per `proc_unit` |
| `result.skus.unit` | `string — result_image \| second` | No | Measurement unit of the cost |
| `result.skus.proc_unit` | `integer` | No | Number of `unit`s included in one charge of `amount` |
| `result.skus.run_task_url` | `string` | No | Full URL of the task endpoint that consumes this sku |

**400** — Invalid request parameters

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | — |
| `error_code` | `string` | No | — |

**401** — Invalid or missing API key

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | — |
